title: Implement a use case over a port
scenario: A use case coordinates domain rules and ports. It should be generic over the port trait so infrastructure stays replaceable.
instructions: Implement register_user over UserRepository. Return DuplicateEmail if the email already exists; otherwise save the new user.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps register-usecase-function explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
